title: Crispy Adventurous Norwegian Herb Stir-fry
description: A dijon mustard and herb-infused stir-fry that's crispy on the outside with a delicate herbal flavor for an adventurous take on traditional dishes.

ingredients.name: Peppers (bell peppers and/or sweet red peppers)
Pork or Pesto (substitute for plant-based option if needed)
Norwegian Herbs (like Norwegian Tarragon and Norwegion Parsley)

instructions: In a small bowl, mix Dijon mustard with finely chopped garlic.
Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat. Add chopped onion and peppers; sauté for about 2 minutes until slightly softened.
Add minced pork (or pesto substitute), Norwegian herbs, and salt/pepper to taste. Stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes until the vegetables are tender-crisp and meat is cooked through.
Stir in the mustard mixture and toss everything together well for a minute or so to meld flavors.
Serve hot with crusty bread if desired.
